svg.title: Robust strategy count by liquidity universe and cost assumption
svg.desc: Four panels show how many strategy configurations remain robust at each liquidity universe and cost multiplier. Only low volatility and small cap retain robust configurations.
svg.text: Robust strategies are regions, not isolated peaks
Count of configurations meeting all four rules: positive net CAGR, t > 1.96, MDD > -60%, mean fill ≥ 80%
Reading rule: one number is the count of robust configurations after changing holdings and AUM. Blank cells have no surviving configuration.
